Action: Power on / restart the Charge Point
Expected Result: SUT powers on and establishes WebSocket connection to CSMS

Action: SUT sends BootNotification to register with the Central System
CSMS rejects the first boot with a wait time
Expected Result: SUT receives Rejected status with waitTime=60s

Action: SUT waits for the specified wait time
SUT retries BootNotification after wait time expires
CSMS accepts the boot and SUT registration completes
Expected Result: Boot accepted; SUT receives current time and heartbeat interval

Action: SUT reports status for each connector
